# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/runner/work/libatbus/libatbus/_codeql_build_dir
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//abort when any inner error found.
ATBUS_MACRO_ABORT_ON_PROTECTED_ERROR:BOOL=OFF

//busid type
ATBUS_MACRO_BUSID_TYPE:STRING=uint64_t

//tcp backlog
ATBUS_MACRO_CONNECTION_BACKLOG:STRING=256

//connection confirm timeout
ATBUS_MACRO_CONNECTION_CONFIRM_TIMEOUT:STRING=30

//memory align size, most architecture require to padding to 16
ATBUS_MACRO_DATA_ALIGN_SIZE:STRING=16

//max protected node size for mem/shm channel
ATBUS_MACRO_DATA_MAX_PROTECT_SIZE:STRING=16384

//node size of (shared) memory channel(must be power of 2)
ATBUS_MACRO_DATA_NODE_SIZE:STRING=256

//small message buffer for io_stream channel(used to reduce memory
// copy when there are many small messages)
ATBUS_MACRO_DATA_SMALL_SIZE:STRING=7168

//huge page size in shared memory channel(unused now)
ATBUS_MACRO_HUGETLB_SIZE:STRING=4194304

//send buffer size for iostream channel
ATBUS_MACRO_IOS_SEND_BUFFER_LENGTH:STRING=8388608

//message header size limit
ATBUS_MACRO_MAX_FRAME_HEADER:STRING=4096

//message size hard limit
ATBUS_MACRO_MESSAGE_LIMIT:STRING=2097152

//channel size for shm/mem channel
ATBUS_MACRO_SHM_MEM_CHANNEL_LENGTH:STRING=268435456

//libatbus ABI tag
ATFRAMEWORK_ATBUS_ABI_TAG:STRING=v3000

//PATH to atframe_utils
ATFRAMEWORK_ATFRAME_UTILS_REPO_DIR:PATH=/home/runner/work/libatbus/libatbus/atframework/atframe_utils

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_BASH:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/bash

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_CP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cp

//PATH to cmake-toolset
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_DIR:PATH=/home/runner/work/libatbus/libatbus/atframework/cmake-toolset

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_GZIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gzip

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_MV:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/mv

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_PWSH:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/pwsh

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_RM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/rm

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_TAR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/tar

ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_COMPRESSION_ZLIB_ROOT_DIR:STRING=/usr

//Cache ssl selector and directly use openssl next time
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_CRYPTO_USE_OPENSSL:BOOL=TRUE

//Enable export(PACKAGE)
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_ENABLE_PACKAGE_REGISTRY:BOOL=OFF

//Do not compile fmt.dev if has std::format
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_FMTLIB_ALTERNATIVE_STD:BOOL=ON

//Parallel building jobs when low memory mode
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_LOW_MEMORY_JOBS:STRING=2

//Disable parallel building for some packages to reduce memory
// usage
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_LOW_MEMORY_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Parallel build jobs
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_PARALLEL_JOBS:STRING=2

//Path to a program.
ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_ZSTD_BIN:FILEPATH=ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_THIRD_PARTY_ZSTD_BIN-NOTFOUND

//Build and linking with dynamic libraries.
ATFRAMEWORK_USE_DYNAMIC_LIBRARY:BOOL=OFF

//ABI tag for libatframe_utils.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_ABI_TAG:STRING=v2008

//Enable C++ Core Guideline: The Guideline Support Library.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_ENABLE_CXX_GSL:BOOL=ON

//Enable alias gsl::string_view=std::string_view.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_ENABLE_CXX_GSL_STD_STRING_VIEW:BOOL=ON

//Enable legacy alias for atframework utils
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_ENABLE_LEGACY_ALIAS:BOOL=ON

//Integer mixed magic mask
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_ENABLE_MIXEDINT_MAGIC_MASK:STRING=0

//Enable network support.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_ENABLE_NETWORK:BOOL=ON

//Enable using libunwind.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LIBUNWIND_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

//Disable multi-thread support lua support.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOCK_DISABLE_MT:BOOL=OFF

//Default log categorize number.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_CATEGORIZE_SIZE:STRING=16

//Enable lua support.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_ENABLE_LUA_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//Max size in one log line.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_MAX_SIZE_PER_LINE:STRING=2097152

//Enable syslog sink for log.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_SINK_ENABLE_SYSLOG_SUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//Max stacks when stacktracing.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_STACKTRACE_MAX_STACKS:STRING=510

//Check lua support.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_WRAPPER_CHECK_LUA:BOOL=ON

//Try to enable stacktrace for log.
ATFRAMEWORK_UTILS_LOG_WRAPPER_ENABLE_STACKTRACE:BOOL=ON

//Boost root directory
BOOST_ROOT:STRING=

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_DOCS:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_DOCUMENTATION:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CATKIN_ENABLE_TESTING:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/home/runner/work/libatbus/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-13

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/home/runner/work/libatbus/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc

CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

ATBUS_MACRO_WITH_UNIX_SOCK:INTERNAL=1

//ADVANCED property for variable: ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_RM

//ADVANCED property for variable: ATFRAMEWORK_CMAKE_TOOLSET_TAR
